The Villa

Built for the kind of weekend where nobody checks their phone.

Shree Villa sits on open land off Talashet Road, reached by a gravel driveway lined with mango trees. Inside, four to five air-conditioned bedrooms open onto a shared living space, with a fully equipped kitchen for the cooks in the group and a home theatre for everyone else.

Outside, a private pool and a wide stone deck look out over the garden — the kind of view that looks completely different in the rain than it does in the sun, and is worth seeing both ways.

The approachA gravel road through the orchard — the first ten minutes of every stay.

Inside the villa

Every room opens onto the next — built for groups who want their own space and a shared one.

Amenities

Everything for a group, nothing you have to ask for twice.

The villa is fully staffed and stocked for self-contained stays — cook on your own schedule, or have the kitchen do it for you.

Private Pool

A full-length pool on the stone deck, open day and night, rain or clear.

Full Kitchen

Granite counters, gas hob and everything needed to cook for ten.

Home Theatre

HD projection setup in the living room for movie nights in.

Garden & Orchard

Open lawns and a working mango orchard surround the property.

Air Conditioning

Every bedroom is air-conditioned, with attached bath and hot water.

On-site Staff

Caretaker and housekeeping on the property throughout your stay.

"Huge, well-maintained rooms, helpful staff, and a quiet location — an excellent weekend getaway."

★★★★★
Guests keep mentioning the same three things: the food, the space, and how quiet it is once you're past the gate.
